name: BSA and Ideal Weight Calculator

seo_description: Use our free bsa & ideal weight calculator to quickly estimate bsa, ideal_weight based on edad, peso_kg, height_cm. Not registration needed.
formula_display: Calculate bsa ideal weight based on input values.
steps: Enter input values: edad: 30, peso_kg: 70, height_cm: 175, sexo: mujer
Calculatete and display the bsa result
Calculatete and display the ideal_weight result
Calculatete and display the adjusted_weight result

Entering zero or negative values where positive required
Using incorrect input values outside recommended range
